title: feat: show model display names in playground selector
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: Proper introductions
gist.blurb: The playground model selector now uses proper, human-readable names instead of raw IDs. Because 'Anthropic Claude Sonnet 4.6' sounds much nicer than just 'claude'.
gist.summary: Updated the playground model selector to display clean, human-readable model names extracted from their descriptions.
gist.impact: Users will now see friendly, descriptive names like 'OpenAI GPT-5 Mini' instead of raw API IDs when choosing models in the playground.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee putting a friendly 'Hello My Name Is' name tag on the Monitor Robot, representing the shift from raw IDs to friendly display names.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the cute bee mascot putting a tiny name tag sticker on a chunky retro Monitor Robot. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Large visible pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
